title: Twerk Crop Growth
description: Simple mod that allows twerking to speed up sapling and crop growth.
body:
![banner](https://i.imgur.com/8W0zD0B.png)
# Twerk Crop Growth

This mod allows very easy growing of crops and trees by twerking (sneaking) or sprinting.  
It applies **bonemeal effect** to blocks, as well as **triggers random ticks** to those that aren't able to be bonemealed.

If you're looking for earlier versions of this mod you can check out [Twerk It Meal](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twerkitmeal "Twerk It Meal") by TicTicBoooom.

## Congfiguration
You can configure the range as well as the chance to attempt growth for twerking and sprinting individually.

If you would like to add more blocks to the growth list, simply update the block tags  

- `twerkcropgrowth:twerk_growth` for Twerking and,
- `twerkcropgrowth:sprint_growth` for Sprinting
